pet_emptyList: There are no pets in the list.
pet_selectPrompt: Please select a pet from the list.
pet_fillFields: Please fill out all the fields before submission.
pet_fillFieldsUpdate: Please fill out all the fields before updating.
pet_deleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete this pet?
pet_copyContent: Would you like to copy the fields from the previous pet?
pet_helpTitle: How To Use the Pet Page
pet_helpContent:
Fill out all fields: name, birthday, species, colour, and owner ID.
Click Add to save.
Tap a pet to view or edit.
Use Update or Delete buttons.
Long-press a pet for quick delete.
VetFormFail: Fill out all the fields before submission.
VetHelpAlertDesc: Please fill out all the form fields by clicking and typing in each box while entering accurate details for a new Veterinarian. Once you fill out all the fields, click the Add button to submit. If you want to keep the information in the form, click YES in the alert. If not, click NO and it will wipe the fields.
VetAddAlertDesc: Do you wish to reuse the fields from the previous entry?
VetNoItems: There are no items in the list.
vaccine_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
vaccine_help_text:
1. Enter vaccine details
2. Click Save
3. Tap to edit
4. Long press to delete
vaccine_save_dialog_message: Reuse this vaccine entry next time?
